---
description: 'Route approved implementation work through the canonical TDD method and report RED/GREEN evidence.'
---

# TDD Command

## Entry

Use `/tdd` with an approved implementation scope, file allowlist, acceptance criteria, exclusions, and reliable targeted test command.

## Route

Follow [tdd-workflow](../skills/tdd-workflow/SKILL.md) for the reusable RED/GREEN/refactor procedure, failure handling, verification, and completion evidence. Follow the canonical Workflow contract declared by Project AGENTS for lifecycle and gate placement only; this Prompt does not select an adopter-facing lifecycle source.

## Output

Return changed files, the observed RED reason, minimal GREEN implementation evidence, targeted and relevant broader test results, assumptions, risk, and any scope deviation.

## Handoff

Stop on deterministic failure, missing prerequisite, or required out-of-scope change. Otherwise return implementation and evidence for independent review.
